programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: Are weather control fears fact, or just modern fiction? Andrew tests theories about chemtrails, cloud seeding, space lasers, and government weather weapons; through demonstrations and expert interviews, he untangles these conspiracies to find the truth.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh travels to the Holy Land to find a lost city where Jesus performed many miracles and is home to three apostles; while investigating competing sites that claim to be the lost city, Josh reveals an inscription that hasn't been seen in 1,400 years.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Josh Gates reopens cases where the truth stayed buried -- he exposes new clues, shaken alibis, and explosive revelations that challenge everything that we thought we knew about Noah's Ark, the terror of anthrax attacks, and Bugsy Siegel's murder.

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: Andrew probes COVID-19's origin from all angles; using intelligence tradecraft, expert interviews, and real-world analysis, he investigates natural spillover, lab-related, and accidental release theories, and what he uncovers is shocking.

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: Are weather control fears fact, or just modern fiction? Andrew tests theories about chemtrails, cloud seeding, space lasers, and government weather weapons; through demonstrations and expert interviews, he untangles these conspiracies to find the truth.

programme.title: Hustlers Gamblers Crooks
programme.desc: A blind man's uncanny ability to win at cards puts him in a fight for his life; a legendary cheat finds a surprising way to outsmart the casinos and the police; an extreme gambler goes under the knife to win the most outrageous bet of all time.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: Dave gets the call from Rob Towner for a once-in-a-lifetime prospect at Gravely Ranch, Mont., where he uncovers the best gold-bearing ground he's ever seen in the lower 48; he must earn the trust of a ranching family wary of miners.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: A strange bunker in a landscape once belonged to a dictator whose paranoid fantasies drove elaborate feats of engineering; new discoveries reveal the secrets of these structures and the nightmares that built them.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: Long, dome-like structures camouflaged by a rural landscape conceal the remains of concrete vaults with a hidden history; experts investigate and uncover state-of-the-art bunkers built to conceal and protect a deadly nuclear secret.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: An elaborate stadium in Lithuania hosts an unlikely Cold War matchup; an industrial relic in England gets caught in a heated labor dispute; a gothic-style tower in Memphis attracts rock and roll royalty.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: Exploring what happened to the large town located just outside of Chernobyl on the eve of disaster, a fleet of ghost ships, and a dangerous mountain road that changed history.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Tales From the Explorers Club
programme.desc: Josh Gates boldly explores members' most heart-pounding journeys into space; Apollo 13 astronauts fight to bring their crippled spacecraft 238,000 miles back to Earth and futuristic SpaceShipOne could give others a chance to travel to space.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Tales From the Explorers Club
programme.desc: Josh recounts a Himalayan mission to find the yeti and a filmmaker's pursuit of the dangerous elephant king; the starving crew of an Antarctic expedition makes difficult choices to survive.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Tales From the Explorers Club
programme.desc: Josh Gates recounts the death-defying exploits of Edmund Hillary and Tenzing Norgay, who summit Mount Everest; two submariners plunge seven miles under the Pacific; a pilot skydives from the edge of space.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Tales From the Explorers Club
programme.desc: Josh Gates tackles history's most chilling polar adventures, including Robert Peary and Matthew Henson's brave push to the North Pole as well as Ernest Shackleton's epic survival in Antarctic ice.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Tales From the Explorers Club
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores daring journeys, including the Kon-Tiki balsa raft crossing the Pacific, NASA's lunar rover making tracks on the moon and an airplane flying around the world without the use of fuel.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Tales From the Explorers Club
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores how club members' swashbuckling exploits inspired Hollywood; a bullwhip-cracking archaeologist may be the real-life Indiana Jones; a Nazi mountaineer's life-changing "Seven Years in Tibet" became a Brad Pitt star turn.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Phil and Jess travel to Ireland and the U.K. to investigate a centuries-old secret society whose most elite members were known to practice satanic worship and ritual sacrifice.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Phil and Jess explore the world's most haunted forest near the site of the Dracula legend and where Josh Gates had his most terrifying experience; during a night investigation, Jess finds herself being watched by someone or something sinister.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: The team journeys to Okinawa, Japan to investigate reports of possessions by the spirits of people who died in the bloody battles of World War 2; they travel into the dark heart of the island where sinister caves hide shocking secrets.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Japan's 2011 Fukushima nuclear disaster, citizens began reporting something truly amazing: UFOs; Phil and Jess enter a radioactive wasteland to discover the stunning truth behind these extraterrestrial encounters.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chernobyl's First 48
programme.desc: The Chernobyl explosion of April 1986, a nuclear accident; witnesses and survivors tell the story of the first two days of the unfolding catastrophe.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: The mysterious vanishing of Northwest Flight 2501 with 58 people on board.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.sub-title: The Lost Grave of Buffalo Bill
programme.desc: Josh saddles up to investigate a scandal over the remains of Wild West legend Buffalo Bill Cody; a first-hand account claims Bill's body was stolen and buried 500 miles away; with new leads, Josh digs for the cowboy's grave and the truth.

programme.title: Harpoon Hunters
programme.desc: Captains Joe and Tyler are in a heated battle in the season finale; fighting for the top spot, dark horse Niko spots a chance to steal the lead; with the biggest catches of the season yet to come, it all comes down to the final weigh-ins at the dock.

programme.title: Gold Rush

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Sig and John co-captain the Time Bandit, sparking a gold rush for crab out west; chaos on the Titan Explorer forces Jake's crew to abandon ship.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: After a deadly chemical leak forces Jake to abandon ship, Keith races to locate the Titan Explorer crew and save their ailing vessel; with Sig aboard the Time Bandit, Mandy takes the Northwestern's helm for her first-ever solo king crab season.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: A typhoon brings monstrous waves and high winds to the west; Rick and Bob attempt to stitch a head wound in turbulent seas; John risks capsize to make a harbor entrance; an emergency tests Jake between his duties as captain and man of the house.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: A brutal knife injury on the Northwestern leaves Sig scrambling; after one crewman quits, tensions explode on the Confidence until even the co-captain revolts; the Wizard faces a nightmarish mechanical failure when Keith's throttle fails in the seas.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy & Juan
programme.desc: In California, Freddy and Juan rescue their first-ever hard rock operation; as stakes heat up with big fixes, Freddy makes a million-dollar discovery.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy & Juan
programme.desc: When Freddy and Juan get an SOS from an Oregon couple's mine, they must unravel an underground mystery buried beneath a dried riverbed; facing misleading dredge tailings and a faulty homemade wash plant, the guys call in all-new tech as a final hope.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy & Juan
programme.desc: An all-female mine crew in Arizona struggles to mine for legendary riches with recycled water; as temps soar, Freddy and Juan scramble to build more efficient solutions and locate higher-grade gold in an attempt to triple the women's production.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy & Juan
programme.desc: A BC miner fights to set up a legacy mine for his son, located beside the gold-rich Fraser River; Freddy and Juan resurrect a boneyard shaker and Franken-build an entire wash plant to triple production, saving a father's dream.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Tony spends millions on a new piece of ground for Mike; Parker buys a Golden Goose to turn the season around; Kevin struggles with a recent hire.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy & Juan
programme.desc: Freddy and Juan face a failing dry mine in Arizona run by military veterans. But when a monsoon wreaks havoc on the rescue, they create their first-ever pay dryer system to quadruple the gold yield.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy & Juan
programme.desc: Freddy and Juan revisit the miners they helped pull back from the brink. Did their fixes survive the test of time, or are old problems roaring back? With gold prices at record highs, the difference between a dream year and disaster has never been sharper.
